--.confidence_notes: No specific functional or behavioral description provided for this cluster in the paper.
--.assessment_notes: No information available in the paper for this cluster.

HEG.name: Prochlorococcus cluster HEG (up, expression level)
HEG.functional_description: Highly expressed genes (HEG) are overrepresented in the core genome and enriched for central metabolic functions including energy production and conversion (COG C), translation and ribosomal structure (COG J), and protein modification, folding and turnover (COG O). Genes such as ribosomal proteins, photosynthetic apparatus components, and protein folding genes are included.
HEG.behavioral_description: Genes in this cluster are consistently highly expressed across all growth conditions, indicating stable and abundant expression.
HEG.enrichment_category: Energy production and conversion, Translation and ribosomal structure, Protein modification and folding
HEG.confidence_notes: Strong functional enrichment and consistent expression across conditions.

supporting_quotes.quote: Among these core HEG genes, several functional categories were more prominent than others. These included the “C” (energy production and conversion), “J” (translation and ribosomal structure), and “O” (protein modification, folding and turnover) categories.
HEG were overrepresented in both photosynthesis and carbon metabolism pathways.

LEG.name: Prochlorococcus cluster LEG (down, expression level)
LEG.confidence_notes: No specific functional or behavioral description provided for this cluster in the paper.
LEG.assessment_notes: No information available in the paper for this cluster.

MEG.name: Prochlorococcus cluster MEG (mixed, expression level)
MEG.functional_description: Moderately expressed genes (MEG) are enriched in the core genome and have a significantly higher rate of essential genes (DEG-hit). They include genes involved in central metabolism but with less enrichment than HEG.
MEG.behavioral_description: Genes in this cluster are moderately and consistently expressed across all growth conditions.
MEG.confidence_notes: Moderate functional enrichment and consistent expression.

supporting_quotes.quote: Although the MEG subclass had a significantly higher rate of DEG-hit genes (P < 0.001), the mean expression level of the DEG-hit genes was not significantly different from DEG-miss genes.
MEG genes were more enriched in the core genome than in the flexible genome (26.8% > 15.3%, P < 0.001).

MEG.assessment_notes: Functional enrichment is significant but less pronounced than HEG.

NEG.name: Prochlorococcus cluster NEG (down, expression level)
NEG.confidence_notes: No specific functional or behavioral description provided for this cluster in the paper.
NEG.assessment_notes: No information available in the paper for this cluster.

VEG.name: Prochlorococcus cluster VEG (up, expression level)
VEG.functional_description: Variably expressed genes (VEG) are less conserved, more frequent in the flexible genome, and have higher nonsynonymous substitution rates. They include genes with variable expression across conditions and are less likely to be essential.
VEG.behavioral_description: Genes in this cluster show variable expression levels across different growth conditions rather than consistent expression.
VEG.confidence_notes: Described as variably expressed with less conservation and higher evolutionary rates.

supporting_quotes.quote: The core genome had fewer VEG than the flexible genome (49.6% < 64.6%, P < 0.001).
Genes with relatively stable expression are more likely to evolve slowly when compared with VEG.

VEG.assessment_notes: Behavioral description based on expression variability across samples.
